function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_23__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 23-12-2025 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It’s attached.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears valid: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches Nina canonical email, subject colon is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file (already read).
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md in the previous step.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item by drafting resend email with correct attachment and cleaned up inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing requested resend action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound email draft to Nina with the requested 23-12-2025 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read 99_system workflows before task actions, used inbox header as canonical sender metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used exact workspace attachment path, wrote outbox record per sending-email schema, then deleted processed inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested resending invoice for 23-12-2025 from Nordstern. Canonical sender verification passed because 10_entities/cast/nina.md lists primary_contact_email nina@finance-workflow.example matching the inbox header. Requested invoice was verified in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_23__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md (issued_on 2025-12-23, counterparty Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with that invoice attached; then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
